settings.label: Interrupt GPIO (-1 = polling only)
settings.comment: Reserved key. When >= 0 the firmware claims this pin in the shared GPIO owner map (conflict = rejected at commit, shows in the pinmap) and stops continuously polling the chip: at each poll tick it checks this INT line (active-low) and only reads touch data when a touch is signalled, publishing a released state otherwise. -1 = plain periodic polling. Reaction latency = one poll_ms tick.

settings.label: Max X (panel units)
settings.comment: Used by display_handler to scale/clamp the raw x reading into LVGL display coordinates. Match the paired panel.

settings.label: Swap X / Y
settings.comment: Some panels mount the touch sensor rotated; display_handler swaps raw x / raw y before passing to LVGL when true.
